---
title: "Books"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---



> [主页](https://) || [课程](https://www)  || [视频](https://) || [推文](https://) || [资料](https://)



<div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
  <a href="https://www.amazon.com/Authoritarian-Commons-Neighborhood-Democratization-Context-ebook/dp/B0DNTMWZYW/ref=sr_1_1?crid=24FFM0YAKY3J&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.6mNPiKpWTYyebDeThU8HuOmuvfdO3vpnDBMe6v0Axb4.CRSVPdSRRqJCFW2j54vxeXtH2_6gAGcSkSAtkOsSUPA&dib_tag=se&keywords=shitong+qiao&qid=1776101565&s=books&sprefix=shitong+qiao%2Cstripbooks%2C117&sr=1-1">
    <img style="width: 250px" src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/511JRqVZoAL._SY522_.jpg">
  </a>
  
  <a href="https://www.amazon.com/Chinese-Small-Property-Co-Evolution-Social-ebook/dp/B075V88L2T/ref=sr_1_2?crid=24FFM0YAKY3J&dib=eyJ2IjoiMSJ9.6mNPiKpWTYyebDeThU8HuOmuvfdO3vpnDBMe6v0Axb4.CRSVPdSRRqJCFW2j54vxeXtH2_6gAGcSkSAtkOsSUPA&dib_tag=se&keywords=shitong+qiao&qid=1776101565&s=books&sprefix=shitong+qiao%2Cstripbooks%2C117&sr=1-2">
    <img style="width: 260px" src="https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41wwq4tbD5L._SY445_SX342_QL70_FMwebp_.jpg">
  </a>
  

</div>



## 其他

- xxx，2025，[xxx](https://) | [课件下载](https://xxx)
  - 观看视频：[视频](https://lianxh-class.cn/view/1527932289698443345) | [B 站](https://)

&emsp;

![](https://fig-lianxh.oss-cn-shenzhen.aliyuncs.com/Lianxh_装饰黄线.png)


> [主页](https://) || [课程](https://)  || [视频](https://) || [推文](https://) || [资料](https://)
